mapper.select: select d.document_seq, d.title, d.users_id, d.created_at, f.file_seq, f.document_seq, f.file_oriname, f.file_sysname, f.file_path, f.mime_type, f.upload_at, u.name from documents d LEFT OUTER JOIN document_files f ON d.document_seq = f.document_seq LEFT OUTER JOIN users u ON u.id = d.users_id order by d.document_seq desc
mapper.insert:
select document_seq.nextval from dual
insert into documents values (#{document_seq}, #{title}, #{users_id}, sysdate)

select d_file_seq.nextval from dual
insert into document_files values (#{file_seq}, #{document_seq}, #{file_oriname}, #{file_sysname}, #{file_path}, #{mime_type}, sysdate)
mapper.update: update documents set title = #{title} where document_seq = #{document_seq}
mapper.select: select document_seq from document_bookmarks where users_id = #{users_id} order by created_at desc
mapper.delete: delete from document_bookmarks where document_seq = #{document_seq} and users_id = #{users_id}
